title: Always Learning
description: Sidekick's AI evolves with your interactions, developing a unique personality.

title: Fully Hackable
description: Open-source hardware and software. Customize everything from its voice to its shell.

title: Emotional Engine
description: Responds to touch, sound, and light with expressive animations and sounds.

title: Connected Companion
description: Connects to your devices and smart home via Wi-Fi and Bluetooth.

title: Privacy First
description: All processing happens on-device. Your data stays yours.

title: Endless Fun
description: Play games, learn to code, or just hang out. Sidekick is always ready for an adventure.
